title: acalypha cuneata
intro: Acalypha cuneata, also known as three-seeded mercury, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Acalypha cuneata include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to treat respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Acalypha cuneata can be used as a tincture, infused oil, or decoction, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
